title: Crispy Fermented Romano Pepper Mexican Stir-fry
description: A brunch-mood vegan-friendly dish featuring crispy fermented romano pepper mixed with a flavorful sauce and vegetables for an indulgent yet healthy breakfast option.
instructions: Add the fermented romano pepper and bell peppers into a bowl, season with salt and cumin seeds. Toss until well coated.
Spread the seasoned mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Air-fry for about 20-25 minutes or until crispy, flipping halfway through cooking time.
In a blender or food processor, combine the avocados, garlic cloves, cilantro leaves, and vegan cheese sauce mix. Blend until smooth.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add blended mixture and cook for about 3-5 minutes until heated through.
Serve hot with crispy fermented romano pepper and garnished with sliced avocado slices.
